content.en:
Those Demon Venerables saw that the Gu Yuan Fruit had been shattered, so they could only snatch the remaining fragments.

After some looting, the fragments were divided.

Then.

The patriarchs are all fleeing, and although the Demon Venerables are chasing and killing, it is obviously not going to have any good effect, and they can't kill these patriarchs.

Ye Tian also fled and soon disappeared.

However, his duplicate body was almost exhausted, after all, in order to destroy the Gu Yuan Fruit, he naturally had to sacrifice a lot.

After coming to a safe position, Ye Tian recondensed the copy body, and only then did he regain his peak combat power.

......

Outside the Ancient Abyss.

The angry voice of the First Demon Venerable Demon Gu spread through many areas.

"Yuan !!!!"

He roared.

And the First Elder was very happy, because the Gu Yuan Fruit was shattered, although the Supreme Dao Void Demon side also snatched some fragments, but those fragments were useless, and they couldn't help the First Demon Venerable break through at all.

In other words, the crisis of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was resolved.

"Mogu, what, are you going to fight, although I am not your opponent, but I can also inflict heavy damage on you even if I try my best!" said the First Elder.

Mogu's anger didn't dissipate, but he didn't really make a move.

He snorted coldly and stopped talking.

The years passed.

this day.

The Ancient Abyss Realm began to tremble, this was a trace that was about to disappear.

The First Elder and the First Demon Venerable still had a way to prolong the time for the Ancient Abyss Realm to appear, but that didn't make sense.

Airplanes!!!!!

A patriarch and a legendary Dao realm have all been moved.

Ye Tian's duplicate body was also removed.

"Go back!"

The First Elder protected these Elders and the Legendary Dao Realm, and led them back to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

From beginning to end, the First Demon Venerable still didn't make a move.

......

Innate Origin Alliance.

After returning, these elders breathed a sigh of relief.

If a real war had just broken out, they would not have survived.

Winter Night's Fortress.

"I'm back, and this time it's a big gain!"

Ye Tian smiled.

He obtained a large amount of resources this time, and also found low-quality first-order Supreme Dao rule items, innate primordial treasures, and a variety of resources that helped the transformation of the Legendary Body.

Moreover, in the last time, he also killed a Demon Venerable, and found a first-order Supreme Dao Rule item and a variety of resources from that Demon Lord, as well as an innate primordial treasure.

The other party estimated that before he had time to study it, it fell into his hands.

He used the eye of the innate primordial treasure that could be identified, and the last innate primordial treasure he obtained was called the Divine Qiongzhu, and its function was to assist in cultivation, which could increase the cultivation speed by a hundred times and the ability to quickly refine resources.

In other words, with such a Divine Qiongzhu Innate Origin Treasure, his cultivation will improve very quickly, and he can save a hundred times the time!

What's more, being able to refine resources quickly will make the cultivation improve extremely fast.

"Hahaha, with Shen Qiongzhu, I estimate that I will soon be able to raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the legendary Dao realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Let's identify the Legendary Blood Treasure and the statue again!"

Ye Tian took out the legendary blood treasure and took the lead in identifying it.

Airplanes!

Soon, the results came out.

Legendary Blood Treasure, which can assist in the cultivation of the Legendary Body and the Mythical Body, can be used to condense the legendary blood marrow, and can improve the qualification potential of a clan

Seeing the appraisal results, Ye Tian was excited.

He has studied the previous ability, but he has not studied the later ability!

"The legendary blood treasure can condense the legendary blood marrow and improve the qualifications of the clan, which is a good thing for the human race!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although the Terrans are now powerful, their potential qualifications are still not as good as some of the top races of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

If the legendary blood marrow can be condensed, then the human race will really take off.

"Identification Eye, this Innate Primordial Treasure is too precious, absolutely surpassing other Innate Primordial Treasures!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It will take a lot of time to study how to condense the blood marrow of the legend, and there is no hurry for the time being.

He used the Eye of Identification to identify the statue again.

Airplanes!

The results were available quickly.

The statue of Mi Luo can be integrated into the body to burst out with powerful combat power, which can assist in the comprehension of the rules of the Dao, and can also form the domain of Mira, so that many living beings can participate in the enlightenment, and assist in the comprehension of the rules of the Dao!

"It was originally called the Miro Statue, and I didn't name it, so I identified its real name, and the legend is that the Blood Treasure was named by me, which directly changed its original real name. Ye Tian said darkly.

He studied the first two abilities of the Miro statue, but he didn't study the Miro domain.

If you study the Mira Domain, you can help others quickly comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao.

But even if this ability is studied, it can't be exposed, at most, let his relatives understand the rules of the Dao, otherwise when the news spreads, those elders will not be able to sit still and invite him to contribute to the Miluo Domain.

"At the very least, when my strength is comparable to that of the top ten patriarchs, I will give the Miluo Domain to the rest of the Terran to use!"

Ye Tian decided.

The days that followed.

While Ye Tian used the Mi Luo statue to comprehend the first sequence of Dao rule items and improve his first sequence to the realm of Dao rules, he was also studying the Mi Luo Domain and the legendary blood marrow, striving to develop these two abilities.

Moreover, after having Shen Qiongzhu, Ye Tian's cultivation was improving very quickly, and with various resources, his cultivation was simply taking off.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of solstice era time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation reached the peak of the legendary Dao realm.

Moreover, he had already cultivated the eight supreme legends to the Dao realm, and all of them had been raised to the consummation realm.

Not only that, but he also researched another ability of the Legendary Blood Treasure - Legendary Blood Marrow, which is to use the Legendary Blood Treasure to absorb various resources, breed within it, and turn into drops of Legendary Blood Marrow, but it needs the power of the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules to assist.

It can be said that if you can't comprehend the rules of the second sequence of supreme paths, you won't be able to study this ability.

"Legendary blood marrow, it's time to use it on the human race!"

Ye Tian condensed a large amount of legendary blood marrow, returned to the human realm, and then diluted the legendary blood marrow and used it by the supreme Dao realm of the human race.

Terran Temple.

A Venerable Terran Supreme Dao Realm came here, queuing up to receive a copy of the legendary blood marrow liquid, and even a copy of the First Supreme Dao Realm.

At first, they wondered what it was, but soon they were all shocked.
